title: ecbolium indicum
intro: Ecbolium indicum is a plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family, commonly known as the mint family, and is native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Ecbolium indicum has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
